On local Hardhat networks this contract will compile but calls that reach the precompile will revert because the precompile is not present.","events":{"QuoteCostEstimated(address,uint64,uint64)":{"params":{"caller":"The address that requested the estimation.","proofSize":"The estimated proof size.","refTime":"The estimated computational time."}},"XcmExecuted(address,uint64,uint64)":{"params":{"caller":"The address that triggered execution.","proofSize":"The proofSize weight limit provided.","refTime":"The refTime weight limit provided."}},"XcmSent(address,bytes)":{"params":{"caller":"The address that triggered the send.","destination":"The SCALE-encoded destination MultiLocation."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"estimateCrossChainQuoteCost(bytes)":{"params":{"xcmMessage":"A SCALE-encoded Versioned XCM message."},"returns":{"proofSize":"The proof size required for execution.","refTime":"The computational time on reference hardware."}},"executeLocalXcm(bytes,uint64,uint64)":{"details":"Calls `pallet_xcm::execute` via the XCM precompile. The call may revert with insufficient balance or invalid message on live networks.","params":{"message":"A SCALE-encoded Versioned XCM message.","proofSize":"The maximum allowed proof size weight.","refTime":"The maximum allowed computational time weight."}},"sendCrossChainNotification(bytes,bytes)":{"details":"Calls `pallet_xcm::send` via the XCM precompile. The destination chain does not need to process the message for this demonstration.","params":{"destination":"SCALE-encoded destination MultiLocation.","message":"SCALE-encoded Versioned XCM message."}}},"title":"CrossChainQuoteEstimator","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"EmptyDestination()":[{"notice":"The provided destination was empty."}],"EmptyXcmMessage()":[{"notice":"The provided XCM message was empty."}]},"events":{"QuoteCostEstimated(address,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted after a successful weight estimation."},"XcmExecuted(address,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted after a local XCM execution is dispatched."},"XcmSent(address,bytes)":{"notice":"Emitted after a cross-chain XCM notification is sent."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"XCM()":{"notice":"The XCM precompile instance bound at the canonical address."},"estimateCrossChainQuoteCost(bytes)":{"notice":"Estimates the execution cost of a SCALE-encoded XCM message."},"executeLocalXcm(bytes,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Executes a SCALE-encoded XCM message locally on the current chain using this contract as the origin, with an explicit weight limit."},"sendCrossChainNotification(bytes,bytes)":{"notice":"Sends a SCALE-encoded XCM message to a remote consensus system."}},"notice":"Demonstrates Polkadot-native XCM precompile access for Track 2. Provides three XCM precompile interactions:   1. `estimateCrossChainQuoteCost` \u2014 weighMessage() to estimate execution cost   2. `executeLocalXcm` \u2014 execute() to run an XCM message locally with the contract's origin   3. `sendCrossChainNotification` \u2014 send() to dispatch an XCM message to a remote chain","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/precompiles/CrossChainQuoteEstimator.sol":"CrossChainQuoteEstimator"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=node_modules/@openzeppelin/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/precompiles/CrossChainQuoteEstimator.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5ebe79193e3cfd7c137fc436bf8065ae74505bdaa0152ae3c76a2bfbbe1eff25","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b2f1315bdc951df3ef0f50ac2acdd70970da43055335f5b70d2963750c47e51a","dweb:/ipfs/QmXKCVR4mxzRXR1t7EpPVczcUudwXSYUevBJfxqo4GfVf4"]},"contracts/precompiles/IXcm.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf4d50b7608a1e8fd14f5eeb8d19900acdfdf8893f87aea5c6c96e5a5776fa2ab","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7280db1727eaab54342a57b9005e461c72e49bf1903d3fd954c0bf20e3aae60c","dweb:/ipfs/QmVbigk5yxjhCMYBFP6Z6Lrw6ipbBRiFLdWp5ZauFHSZXx"]}},"version":1}

returns.proofSize: The proof size required for execution.
returns.refTime: The computational time on reference hardware.

executeLocalXcm(bytes,uint64,uint64).details: Calls `pallet_xcm::execute` via the XCM precompile. The call may revert with insufficient balance or invalid message on live networks.

params.proofSize: The maximum allowed proof size weight.
params.refTime: The maximum allowed computational time weight.

sendCrossChainNotification(bytes,bytes).details: Calls `pallet_xcm::send` via the XCM precompile. The destination chain does not need to process the message for this demonstration.

XCM().notice: The XCM precompile instance bound at the canonical address.

estimateCrossChainQuoteCost(bytes).notice: Estimates the execution cost of a SCALE-encoded XCM message.

executeLocalXcm(bytes,uint64,uint64).notice: Executes a SCALE-encoded XCM message locally on the current chain using this contract as the origin, with an explicit weight limit.

sendCrossChainNotification(bytes,bytes).notice: Sends a SCALE-encoded XCM message to a remote consensus system.
